stated_result_or_null: A Memoir of the AMS by Forrest, Hunton, and Kellendonk that develops a systematic framework for computing the topological invariants (Cech cohomology and K-theory of the associated tiling/hull space) of quasiperiodic patterns produced by the cut-and-project (projection) method, expressing them in terms of the geometry of the window and the projection data.
